history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead (C2) is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The safest progress is to turn downward first, since the cells below me in column B are open.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe (`.`), so I can move forward toward the open path leading down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. Moving forward would go to row 04 column B, which is safe floor. Since I need to navigate toward the goal at row 08 column H and the path below me is open, the best next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing down. The safe path appears to be along column B downward toward row 08, then moving right along row 08 to the goal at column H. I should keep moving forward for now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B, facing down (`v`). The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column B is safe (`.`), so I can move forward toward the lower open area and ultimately toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down, but moving forward would go to row 07 column B, which is safe. However, the goal is at row 08 column H, and the safest path appears to be moving down first through column B toward the open area below. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down, and the cell directly ahead at row 08 column B is safe. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 08 column H while avoiding the lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead is row 09 column B, which is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The goal is to my right on the same row, so I should turn right to face toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing left (`<`). The cell to my left is a wall, so moving forward is not safe. I need to reorient toward the open path and the goal at row 08 column H. Turning right will make me face up, which is the first step toward navigating toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The safest direct path is to move right along row 08, but I am currently facing up, so I need to turn right to face east first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, and the path along row 08 from C through G is clear floor cells. Moving forward will take me closer to the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column C and facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H, so the safest move is to go straight toward it along the same row. The next cell to the right is empty, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H, so I can move straight right along the open floor cells E, F, and G without entering any lava. The next safe step is forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D, facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is at row 08 column H. The path to the right is clear: E, F, and G are safe floor cells leading toward the goal. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F, facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is immediately to my right at row 08 column H, with a safe floor cell at row 08 column G in between. Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is immediately to my right at row 08 column G, and that cell is safe. I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
